events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a crew using a field method that is less tidy than preferred but still matches product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. This is a pass situation - the work is compliant with instructions and requirements, just not as tidy as the preferred shop approach.
